id.description: The id of the pay period state

company_id.description: The id of the company that the pay period belongs to

start.description: It is one representation of ISO8601 date extended format

end.description: It is one representation of ISO8601 date extended format

closed.description: Whether or not the pay period is closed

finalized.description: Whether or not the pay period is finalized (all location states are closed)

states.description: Whether or not the location pay period is closed/processed

id.description: The id of the pay period state.

location_id.description: The location id of the company.

closed.description: Whether or not the pay period is closed

processed.description: The date the pay period was processed for an export.

modified_by_user_id.description: The user id of the user who modified the pay period. This may indicate an employee or a server process. Server processes will have a negative user id.

closed_or_reopened_at.description: It is one representation of ISO8601/RFC3339 date time format

all_punches_approved.description: Whether all the punches in the payroll period that the user can see have been approved. Query parameter include_punches_status must be true.

employee_punch_approvals.description:
Identify if all punches were reviewed by the employee. Query parameter include_punches_status must be true.
If Compliance is not available or the feature is disabled the property will be null.

created.description: It is one representation of ISO8601/RFC3339 date time format

modified.description: It is one representation of ISO8601/RFC3339 date time format
